Test Title: Loading state shows ""Loading agents..."" while data fetches
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Observe before content loads
Expected Result: Centered text ""Loading agents..."" is shown while modelsLoading or contentLoading is true

Test Title: Hero section renders with blue-to-white gradient background
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Observe the hero area
Expected Result: Hero has linear-gradient from blue-lt to white with bottom border; max-width 900px content centered

Test Title: Agent Builder - Beta"" pill badge renders in hero
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Observe the badge above H1
Expected Result: Blue-bordered pill reading ""Agent Builder - Beta"" is visible above the heading

Test Title: H1 renders ""Build AI Agents"" with ""AI Agents"" in blue
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Observe the H1
Expected Result: H1 reads ""Build AI Agents""; the words ""AI Agents"" are rendered in blue color

Test Title: Hero subtitle renders correct description text
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Observe paragraph below H1
Expected Result: Text ""Create custom AI agents powered by 400+ models. Configure
Test Status: and monitor your agents from one dashboard."" is visible

Test Title: + Create Agent"" button is visible in hero with blue style
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Observe hero CTA buttons
Expected Result: + Create Agent"" button with blue background and white text is visible"

Test Title: Try in Chat First"" button is visible in hero with outlined style
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Observe hero CTA buttons
Expected Result: Try in Chat First"" button with outlined style (no fill) is visible beside Create Agent"

Test Title: Try in Chat First"" button navigates to /chat
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Click "Try in Chat First"
Expected Result: Browser navigates to /chat

Test Title: Agent Templates section heading and subtitle render
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Scroll to template grid area
Expected Result: H2 ""Agent Templates"" and subtitle ""Start from a template and customize for your needs."" are visible

Test Title: Template grid uses auto-fill layout with min card width 280px
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Observe the template card grid
Expected Result: Cards arranged in auto-fill columns with minmax(280px 1fr)

Test Title: Each template card shows icon name description tags and Use Template button
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Observe any template card
Expected Result: Card contains: 44×44 blue-lt icon + name (Syne bold) + description + all tags as chips + ""Use Template ->"" blue button

Test Title: Popular templates show an amber ""Popular"" badge beside the name
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Find a template with popular=true
Expected Result: Amber-colored ""Popular"" pill badge is visible next to the template name

Test Title: Non-popular templates do not show the Popular badge
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Find a template without popular flag
Expected Result: No ""Popular"" badge is rendered on that card

Test Title: How Agent Creation Works"" section renders with 5 numbered steps
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Scroll to the how-it-works section
Expected Result: White card with H2 ""How Agent Creation Works"" + 5 numbered circles (1–5) each with a title and description

Test Title: Five step titles match: Choose Template / Select Model / Write System Prompt / Connect Tools / Deploy & Monitor
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Observe each step in the how-it-works section
Expected Result: Step titles are exactly: ""Choose Template"" / ""Select Model"" / ""Write System Prompt"" / ""Connect Tools"" / ""Deploy & Monitor""

Test Title: Step numbers render as blue filled circles
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Observe the step number indicators
Expected Result: Each step has a 36×36 circular blue background with white bold step number

Test Title: + Create Agent"" button opens the wizard modal
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Click "+ Create Agent"
Expected Result: Wizard modal opens with dark overlay; header shows ""Agent Creation Wizard""

Test Title: Clicking ""Use Template ->"" on a card opens wizard with that template pre-filled
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /agents
2. Click "Use Template ->" on any template card
Expected Result: Wizard opens; Step 1 shows the template name pre-filled in Agent Name input and a template info card below

Test Title: Wizard header shows title ""Agent Creation Wizard""
Test Steps:
1. Open the wizard via any entry point
2. Observe modal header
Expected Result: Header reads ""Agent Creation Wizard"" in Syne bold font

Test Title: Wizard header shows current step as ""Step {N} of {total}: {step label}""
Test Steps:
1. Open the wizard
2. Observe the subtitle in modal header
Expected Result: Text reads ""Step 1 of {total}: {first step label}""

Test Title: Wizard renders a progress bar with one segment per step
Test Steps:
1. Open the wizard
2. Observe the bar below the header
Expected Result: A row of equal-width segments is shown; active and past segments are blue; future segments are gray (border2)

Test Title: Step 1 progress bar shows only first segment filled
Test Steps:
1. Open the wizard
2. Observe the progress bar on Step 1
Expected Result: First segment is blue; all remaining segments are gray

Test Title: Step 1 heading reads ""Name Your Agent""
Test Steps: 1. Open the wizard
Expected Result: H3 ""Name Your Agent"" is visible in Step 1 content area

Test Title: Step 1 agent name input is pre-filled with template name when opened via template
Test Steps:
1. Click "Use Template ->" on a template card
2. Observe Step 1 input value
Expected Result: Agent name input contains the template's name as its pre-filled value

Test Title: Step 1 shows template info card when opened via template
Test Steps:
1. Click "Use Template ->" on a template card
2. Observe Step 1 content below the input
Expected Result: Blue-lt info card shows the template name (bold) and its description

Test Title: Step 1 does not show template info card when opened via ""+ Create Agent""
Test Steps:
1. Click "+ Create Agent" (no template selected)
2. Observe Step 1 content
Expected Result: No template info card is rendered; only the agent name input and heading are shown

Test Title: Step 1 agent name input accepts free-text editing
Test Steps:
1. Open the wizard
2. Clear the agent name input
3. Type a new name
Expected Result: Input reflects the typed value

Test Title: Continue ->"" button advances wizard from Step 1 to Step 2
Test Steps:
1. Open the wizard (Step 1)
2. Click "Continue ->"
Expected Result: Wizard advances to Step 2; header updates to ""Step 2 of {total}""; progress bar fills second segment

Test Title: <- Back"" button is not shown on Step 1
Test Steps:
1. Open the wizard
2. Observe footer on Step 1
Expected Result: No ""<- Back"" button is visible on Step 1

Test Title: <- Back"" button appears from Step 2 onward
Test Steps:
1. Open the wizard
2. Navigate to Step 2
3. Observe footer
Expected Result: <- Back"" button is visible in the modal footer on Step 2 and all subsequent steps"

Test Title: <- Back"" button returns to the previous step
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Step 3 in the wizard
2. Click "<- Back"
Expected Result: Wizard goes back to Step 2; header and progress bar update accordingly

Test Title: Step 2 heading reads ""Select AI Model""
Test Steps:
1. Advance wizard to Step 2
2. Observe content heading
Expected Result: H3 ""Select AI Model"" is visible

Test Title: Step 2 shows a scrollable list of up to 30 language models
Test Steps:
1. Advance wizard to Step 2
2. Observe model list
Expected Result: Scrollable list (max-height 320px) with up to 30 models filtered to type ""language""

Test Title: Step 2 each model row shows radio icon name org price and rating
Test Steps:
1. Advance wizard to Step 2
2. Observe any model row
Expected Result: Row has: radio button + model icon + name (bold) + org | price (text3) + ""Rating {value}""

Test Title: First capable model is pre-selected in Step 2
Test Steps:
1. Open the wizard
2. Navigate to Step 2
Expected Result: The first model in the capableModels list has its radio checked and blue-lt background

Test Title: Selected model row has blue border and blue-lt background
Test Steps:
1. Advance wizard to Step 2
2. Click a different model row
Expected Result: Clicked model row gets blue border + blue-lt background; previously selected row reverts to default

Test Title: Step 3 heading reads ""System Prompt""
Test Steps:
1. Advance wizard to Step 3
2. Observe content
Expected Result: H3 ""System Prompt"" is visible

Test Title: Step 3 textarea is pre-filled with generated prompt when started from a template
Test Steps:
1. Open wizard via "Use Template ->" on a template
2. Navigate to Step 3
Expected Result: Textarea contains ""You are a {template.name}. {template.desc}\n\nBe helpful
Test Status: and professional. Always stay within your defined scope.""

Test Title: Step 3 textarea is editable and accepts free-text changes
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Step 3
2. Clear the textarea
3. Type a custom prompt
Test Data: Prompt: Always respond in bullet points
Expected Result: Textarea reflects the typed value

Test Title: Step 3 textarea has a tip text below it
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Step 3
2. Observe text below textarea
Expected Result: Text ""Tip: Be specific about what the agent should and should not do."" is visible

Test Title: Step 4 heading reads ""Connect Tools""
Test Steps:
1. Advance wizard to Step 4
2. Observe content heading
Expected Result: H3 ""Connect Tools"" is visible

Test Title: Step 4 shows 6 tool options with checkboxes
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Step 4
2. Count tool rows
Expected Result: Six rows visible: Web Search / Database Lookup / Email Send / Calendar Access / Slack Integration / Custom API

Test Title: Every tool row shows ""Coming soon"" label
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Step 4
2. Observe each tool row
Expected Result: Coming soon"" text appears at the right of every tool row"

Test Title: Step 5 heading reads ""Review & Deploy""
Test Steps:
1. Advance wizard to Step 5
2. Observe content heading
Expected Result: H3 ""Review & Deploy"" is visible

Test Title: Step 5 summary shows Agent Name Model Provider and Context rows
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Step 5
2. Observe the summary list
Expected Result: Four rows with keys: ""Agent Name"" / ""Model"" / ""Provider"" / ""Context"" each showing the configured value

Test Title: Step 5 summary reflects the name entered in Step 1
Test Steps:
1. Enter a custom name in Step 1
2. Navigate to Step 5
Expected Result: Agent Name row in summary shows ""My Bot""

Test Title: Step 5 summary reflects the model selected in Step 2
Test Steps:
1. Select a specific model in Step 2
2. Navigate to Step 5
Expected Result: Model row shows the selected model's icon and name

Test Title: Step 5 shows a teal ""Ready"" info box
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Step 5
2. Observe below the summary
Expected Result: Teal-colored box with text ""Ready: Your agent configuration is ready. Click 'Deploy Agent' to make it live."" is visible

Test Title: Step 5 shows ""Deploy Agent"" button instead of ""Continue ->""
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the last wizard step
2. Observe the footer button
Expected Result: Deploy Agent"" (teal filled) is shown instead of ""Continue ->""; Back button is still present"

Test Title: Deploy Agent"" closes the wizard and navigates to /chat?agent=new
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Step 5
2. Click "Deploy Agent"
Expected Result: Wizard modal closes and browser navigates to /chat?agent=new

Test Title: × button closes the wizard modal from any step
Test Steps:
1. Open the wizard
2. Navigate to any step
3. Click the × button in the header
Expected Result: Wizard closes; page returns to the agents page with no modal

Test Title: Closing the wizard does not reset the page content
Test Steps:
1. Open the wizard
2. Click × to close
Expected Result: Agent templates grid and how-it-works section remain fully visible after closing

Test Title: Progress bar fills segments incrementally as steps advance
Test Steps:
1. Open the wizard
2. Click Continue through each step
3. Observe the bar
Expected Result: Each Continue click fills one more segment blue; on Step 5 all segments are blue

Test Title: Wizard modal content area is scrollable when content overflows
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Step 2 (model list)
2. Observe model list scroll behavior
Expected Result: Model list scrolls independently (max-height 320px) without the modal itself resizing

Test Title: Step 3 textarea is vertically resizable
Test Steps:

2. Drag the textarea resize handle
Expected Result: Textarea height changes when resized (resize:vertical); horizontal resize is blocked
